title: Battle of Empress Teta (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several battles taking place on [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] (also known as Koros Major) throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history:

*[[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]:
**'''[[Battle of Koros Major (Great Hyperspace War)|Battle of Koros Major]]'''
*[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]:
**'''[[Battle of Koros Major]]'''
**'''[[Battle of Empress Teta]]'''
**'''[[Recapture of the Empress Teta system]]'''
